mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS writerId, p.title, p.category, p.mode_type AS modeType, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.scrap_count AS scrapCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.mode_type = #{modeType} ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS writerId, p.title, p.category, p.mode_type AS modeType, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.scrap_count AS scrapCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.mode_type = #{modeType} AND p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.created_at DESC

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS writerId, p.title, p.content, p.image_path AS imagePath, p.mode_type AS modeType, p.category AS category, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.scrap_count AS scrapCount, p.created_at AS createdAt, p.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM post p JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.user_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId}
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, image_path = #{imagePath}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment (post_id, user_id, content) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS writerId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY c.created_at ASC

SELECT c.comment_id AS commentId, c.post_id AS postId, c.user_id AS userId, u.login_id AS writerId, c.content, c.created_at AS createdAt, c.updated_at AS updatedAt FROM comment c JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE comment SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE comment_id = #{commentId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.user_id AS userId, p.title, p.content, p.image_path AS imagePath, p.mode_type AS modeType, p.category AS category, p.like_count AS likeCount, p.comment_count AS commentCount, p.scrap_count AS scrapCount, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM post p WHERE p.is_deleted = 0 AND p.like_count > 0 ORDER BY p.like_count DESC, p.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
